ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player (e.g., Allrounder, Batsman, Bowler) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "hand" TEXT /* Dominant hand of the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the team */,
  "average_runs_conceded" REAL /* Average runs conceded by the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_fitness" (
  "fitness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "fitness_test_date" TEXT /* Date when the fitness test was conducted */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Fitness level of the player */,
  "fitness_score" REAL /* Overall fitness score of the player */,
  "strength_level" REAL /* Strength level of the player */,
  "endurance_level" REAL /* Endurance level of the player */,
  "speed_level" REAL /* Speed level of the player */,
  "agility_level" REAL /* Agility level of the player */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments about the player's fitness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fitness_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the player */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for unavailability, if any */,
  "unavailability_reason" TEXT /* Reason for unavailability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_availability_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "winning_team" INTEGER /* Winning team */,
  "losing_team" INTEGER /* Losing team */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Match result */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Match format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_performance" (
  "match_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Runs scored in the match */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Wickets taken in the match */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Catches taken in the match */,
  "run_outs" INTEGER /* Run outs in the match */,
  "stumps" INTEGER /* Stumpings in the match */,
  "man_of_the_match" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was the man of the match */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties scored in the match */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries scored in the match */,
  "four_wicket_hauls" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls taken in the match */,
  "five_wicket_hauls" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls taken in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_performance" (
  "season_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played in the season */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored in the season */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken in the season */,
  "season_average" REAL /* Average score of the player in the season */,
  "season_strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player in the season */,
  "season_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player in the season */,
  "season_economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opposition_teams" (
  "opposition_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opposition team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the opposition team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opposition team */,
  "opposition_team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the opposition team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opposition_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_opposition_performance" (
  "opposition_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opposition performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "opposition_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposition team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played against the opposition */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored against the opposition */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken against the opposition */,
  "opposition_average" REAL /* Average score against the opposition */,
  "opposition_strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate against the opposition */,
  "opposition_wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken against the opposition */,
  "opposition_economy" REAL /* Economy rate against the opposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opposition_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_opposition_performance_opposition_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opposition_team_id") REFERENCES opposition_teams ("opposition_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_opposition_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
